name: Get cash now
description_short: ACE Cash Express in Memphis offers payday loans ($100–$425), check cashing, money transfers, and prepaid card services with in-store and online options.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services retailer with a physical location at 4437 S 3rd St in Memphis, Tennessee. The company operates as a multi-service cash advance and financial services provider, not primarily as a payday lender despite offering that product. The Memphis location provides a wide range of consumer financial services including check cashing, payday loans, money transfers via MoneyGram, bill payment, money orders, ATM services, tax refund cashing, and prepaid debit card products (Porte, Flare Account, and ACE Elite Visa). They also offer personal loans alongside their core short-term lending products. The company distinguishes itself through a hybrid model combining in-store customer service with online application and account management options, plus banking partnerships with Pathward for deposit accounts and card products. ACE operates extended hours (9 AM–7 PM weekdays, 9 AM–6 PM Saturday) and positions itself as a one-stop financial services hub for unbanked and underbanked consumers. Honest assessment: While ACE serves a legitimate need for quick cash and basic financial services, payday loans carry high implied costs (though specific APR/fees are not disclosed on this page), and the company's primary revenue model depends on consumers with limited banking access or credit options. The breadth of services masks that this is fundamentally a high-cost lending operation, and borrowers should carefully evaluate terms before committing to any loan product.
pros: Offers payday loans online and in-store with same-day or next-day funding potential ($100–$425 range)
Check cashing available without bank account required—only valid government ID needed
Extended operating hours (weekdays 9 AM–7 PM) accommodate working customers
Multiple financial products in one location (money transfers, bill pay, tax services, prepaid cards)
MoneyGram money transfer service available domestically and to 200+ countries
Partnership with Pathward provides FDIC-insured deposit accounts and prepaid debit options
In-person support for account management and cash withdrawals at physical location
cons: Payday loans carry typical high-cost lending structure with APR and fees not disclosed on this page
Full repayment due on next payday creates debt trap risk for consumers living paycheck-to-paycheck
Prepaid card and deposit account products involve fees (noted as 'Terms and fees apply' but not detailed)
Physical location dependency limits access compared to fully digital lenders
No transparent pricing or cost calculator visible on the location page
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate access to cash and basic financial services
Workers with irregular income or unexpected expenses requiring emergency short-term loans
Check earners without bank accounts who need reliable check cashing without account requirements
Consumers seeking multiple services (transfers, bill pay, tax refunds) at one physical location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express Memphis is best for unbanked consumers and check earners who need immediate emergency cash or basic financial services without a traditional bank account. The primary caveat is that payday loans, while fast and accessible, are high-cost debt products suitable only for true emergencies with repayment plans in place—not recurring financial management.
services: Tax refund check cashing and tax refund card withdrawals
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
